creator: tmseck@web.de
text:
Forgot to mention: please remove files/patch-squid-advisory-2010:1

Please commit this patch too, it fixes ports/144653:

Index: squid.in
===================================================================
--- squid.in	(.../www/squid/files/squid.in)	(Revision 1783)
+++ squid.in	(.../local/squid/files/squid.in)	(Revision 1783)
@@ -32,7 +32,7 @@
 # squid_pidfile:
 #		The name (including the full path) of the Squid
 #		master process' PID file.
-#		Default: %%PREFIX%%/squid/squid.pid.
+#		Default: %%PREFIX%%/squid/logs/squid.pid.
 #		You only need to change this if you changed the
 #		corresponding entry in your Squid configuration.
 #
